# R/T Automotive & Transmission

> Wadsworth's trusted transmission and auto repair shop. Family-run, expert work on all makes and models, from transmission rebuilds to brakes, diagnostics and everyday maintenance, done right the first time at a fair, honest price.

## Business facts
- Business: R/T Automotive & Transmission
- Location: Wadsworth, OH
- Phone: (330) 334-4227
- Service area: Wadsworth, OH, Medina County, OH
- Rating: 4.7 stars (66 reviews)
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday: 09:00-17:00

## Services / offerings
- Transmission Repair & Rebuilds
- Transmission Service & Fluid Exchange
- Engine Diagnostics
- Brakes & Suspension
- Clutch Repair & Replacement
- General Auto Repair & Maintenance

## Common questions
- Do you rebuild transmissions in-house? Yes. Transmission rebuilds and repairs are our specialty, automatic, manual and CVT, on both domestic and import vehicles. We diagnose the real problem before recommending a rebuild.
- Do you work on all makes and models? We do. From daily drivers to trucks and performance vehicles, our team services all makes and models, foreign and domestic.
- How do I get a quote or schedule service? Call us at (330) 334-4227 or send a request through our website. Tell us what your vehicle is doing and we will get you scheduled and give you a straight, fair estimate.
- What are your hours? We are open Monday through Friday, 9:00 am to 5:00 pm, and closed Saturday and Sunday.
- Where are you located? Right on Main Street in Wadsworth at 349 Main St, Wadsworth, OH 44281, serving Wadsworth and all of Medina County.

## Contact
Call (330) 334-4227 for more information.
